cases.user_input: Add a new Groq LLM provider to PixelForge. Groq uses OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions but with different defaults. Walk through every file needing change and describe exact modifications.
cases.reference:
1. pixelmap.ts: Add 'groq' to LLMProviderType union. Add Groq preset to PROVIDER_PRESETS: apiUrl 'https://api.groq.com/openai', model 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile'.
2. Create src/services/GroqProvider.ts following OpenAIProvider pattern.
3. llmClient.ts: Import GroqProvider, add 'groq' dispatch case.
4. ProviderSelect.tsx: No change if presets drive options; otherwise add Groq.
5. Add GroqProvider.test.ts following existing test patterns.

cases.user_input: Add a new Groq LLM provider to PixelForge. Groq uses OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions but with different defaults. Walk through every file needing change and describe exact modifications.
cases.response:
- **`src/types/pixelmap.ts`**  
  - Add `'groq'` to the `LLMProviderType` union.  
  - Add a new entry to `PROVIDER_PRESETS`:
    ```ts
    {
      type: 'groq',
      label: 'Groq',
      apiUrl: 'https://api.groq.com/openai/v1',
      model: 'llama3-70b-8192',
    }
    ```

- **`src/services/llmClient.ts`**  
  - In `getProviders()`, add `'groq': new OpenAICompatibleProvider()` to the `providers` object (the import for `OpenAICompatibleProvider` already exists).

No other files require changes. The `ProviderSelect` component and all routing logic automatically support the new type via the updated constants.
cases.reference:
1. pixelmap.ts: Add 'groq' to LLMProviderType union. Add Groq preset to PROVIDER_PRESETS: apiUrl 'https://api.groq.com/openai', model 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile'.
2. Create src/services/GroqProvider.ts following OpenAIProvider pattern.
3. llmClient.ts: Import GroqProvider, add 'groq' dispatch case.
4. ProviderSelect.tsx: No change if presets drive options; otherwise add Groq.
5. Add GroqProvider.test.ts following existing test patterns.
